data.body: PLAN-REVIEW (2026-07-09): BLOCK — 8 blocking findings. The refactor's TRUE scope is far larger than the 2-line description: (1) 45 loader sites in reconciler src (spec_from_file_location / _load / lazy_load / _try_load_step); (2) __main__.py PRODUCTION entry loads every pipeline step via _try_load_step (spec_from_file_location) — not just tests; (3) src/rebar/_engine has NO __init__.py, so `import rebar._engine.rebar_reconciler` fails today — eca4 must first make _engine a proper package (+ hatch/packaging config) so AC5 can pass; (4) ~170 test files each inline their OWN spec_from_file_location loader (NOT centralized) and 124 pre-seed FLAT sys.modules keys (e.g. sys.modules['reconcile_mutation']=mock) to inject mocked siblings — converting to package imports breaks that mocking contract per-file (not a find-replace); (5) the AC grep `_load(` misses lazy_load( callers (~10). AC2 tightened to 'delete outright, no stub'. NEXT: expand the plan to address __main__.py, the lazy_load callers, the _engine-package/packaging step, the 170-test + mocking-contract sweep strategy, and circular-import handling, then re-run review-plan. This is a high-blast-radius, mostly-mechanical-but-not-fully sweep of the most change-heavy subsystem.
